No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides foundational knowledge in electronics, a required tertiary education, directly supporting Target 4.3 (tertiary education) and 4.4 (relevant skills for employment).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: Knowledge of semiconductors and electronics is foundational for developing energy-efficient technologies and clean energy systems, aligning with Targets 7.3 and 7.a.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops technical skills in electronics, crucial for technological upgrading and innovation, contributing to economic productivity as per Target 8.2.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on semiconductors and electronics is fundamental for technological innovation and upgrading industrial capabilities, directly supporting Targets 9.5 and 9.b.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Knowledge of electronics is a prerequisite for developing technologies that improve resource efficiency, indirectly supporting Target 12.a, though sustainability is not explicitly mentioned.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or strong implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to global partnerships or cooperation.
